rule: Strict original Thaumcraft 4 parity; no invented mechanics, items, recipes, GUI progression, textures or behaviour.
changed: Infusion Matrix craft state now stores a locked catalyst id using original-compatible recipeobject debug NBT and validates the catalyst plus component pedestal recipe lock before the first component is pulled.
Infusion Matrix component pull list now goes through TC4InfusionRuntime.orderedComponentPullList, preserving the original ConfigRecipes component order without sorting, deduping, or mirror-id drift.
Infusion overlay now exposes live pending essentia, pending component count, and instability from the BlockEntity instead of only a generic progress bar.
Added TC4RevealerHudAdapter: a Forge 1.19.2 adapter for the original TC4 IRevealer/IGoggles-style Aura Node HUD using the existing node state and original aspect icon texture paths.
Helmet/Goggles/Thaumometer node overlay now uses the revealer adapter and can target a nearby actual AuraNodeBlockEntity instead of only exact block-hit text output.

Aura Node right-click scanning no longer uses string contains checks for thaumometer/goggles; it now accepts only the actual registered Thaumometer, Goggles of Revealing, or Helmet of Revealing items.
Thaumonomicon research page navigation no longer inserts modern Button widgets inside the original book; it uses original-style manual click hotzones over the copied book texture.
Removed unused duplicate source class com.darkifov.thaumcraft.item.ThaumometerItem; the active registered item remains com.darkifov.thaumcraft.block.ThaumometerItem.
Added Stage343-362 audit script and updated continuation prompt.
explicit_adapters: TC4InfusionRuntime.orderedComponentPullList: Forge 1.19.2 adapter preserving original ConfigRecipes order.
InfusionMatrixBlockEntity lockedCatalystId/recipeobject: NBT-safe recipe-lock adapter for modern BlockEntity persistence.
TC4RevealerHudAdapter: client-only IRevealer/IGoggles HUD adapter for Aura Node data already present in the port.
TC4ResearchPageScreen manual navigation hotzones: 1.19.2 Screen adapter replacing modern widgets inside the original book texture.
not_finished: Infusion Matrix renderer still needs deeper original beam/instability visual parity and full pedestal animation parity.
Aura Node renderer/HUD still needs exact original size/alpha/noise formula verification against TileNodeRenderer.
Goggles overlay still needs full block/entity aspect HUD parity, not only Aura Node display.
Thaumonomicon still needs a full per-research audit of page order, recipe icons, coordinates, hidden parents, siblings and gates against original ConfigResearch.
Research Table still needs deeper original container/copy/bonus aspect/grid completion parity testing.
Wand foci still need all remaining original ItemFocusBasic and focus-class effects/projectiles verified against 1.7.10 source.
gradle_status: Not executed in sandbox: Gradle wrapper still attempts to download gradle-7.5.1-bin.zip and the sandbox has no DNS/network. User reported GitHub runner downloaded the jar/distribution, so the ZIP is prepared for GitHub CI build.
